Footer.tagline: T.E.N.E.G.T.A builds secure, intelligent systems that help organizations work with higher efficiency and clearer decisions.

meta.title: T.E.N.E.G.T.A – Deployable intelligent systems for enterprises
meta.description: We design and deliver AI, cybersecurity, and systems development — from idea to operations.

credibility.trustedBy: Trusted by teams building critical infrastructure

thoughtLeadership.title: Why legacy SIEM fails in Arabic enterprise environments
thoughtLeadership.description: A technical essay on alert fatigue, bilingual log pipelines, and building detection that operators actually use.

problemSolution.problem: Most enterprises don't fail from lack of data. They fail from systems that can't act on it.
problemSolution.solution: We build the intelligence layer between your data and your decisions — AI systems, cybersecurity, and software engineering that run in production, not slide decks.

hero.title: We build the intelligence layer between your data and your decisions.
hero.tagline: AI Systems · Cybersecurity · Software Engineering for enterprises
hero.rotate1: From pilot to production — delivery you can measure.
hero.rotate2: AI and data pipelines wired into real operations.
hero.rotate4: One coherent program: AI, cyber, software, and infrastructure.
hero.subtitle: We design and deliver solutions in artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and systems development — from concept to live operations.
hero.lead: T.E.N.E.G.T.A is a technology company focused on deployable, measurable systems that help organizations raise efficiency, reduce risk, and speed up decisions.

services.title: What we focus on
services.valueProposition: We don’t stop at ideas — we build practical solutions that scale and run in production.

ai.title: Artificial intelligence
ai.desc: We turn data into clearer decisions with models for prediction, classification, and operational automation.

security.title: Cybersecurity
security.desc: We protect systems and data with secure design, attentive monitoring, and controls that reduce risk before incidents happen.

software.title: Software systems
software.desc: We build tailored platforms and applications that run operations and connect teams and data in one place.

infra.title: Digital infrastructure
infra.desc: We create the stack that makes solutions operable: databases, integrations, deployment, and monitoring.

cta.title: Have a project or pilot in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell us your goals — we respond on business days.

SystemVisualizer.title: Describe your system — we'll visualize it
SystemVisualizer.subtitle: Write any idea in any language. We'll detect its components and draw its live architecture.
SystemVisualizer.placeholder: Example: I want a system that monitors my warehouses and predicts stock shortages…

SystemVisualizer.empty: Your architecture vision will appear here

summaries.ai: Data pipelines, models, and inference wired for operational decisions.
summaries.cyber: Zero-trust controls, detection, and audit trails across your perimeter.
summaries.software: Auth, APIs, core services, and frontends as one deployable platform.
summaries.infra: Load balancing, clusters, data stores, and observability at scale.
summaries.fintech: Payments, risk, ledger, and compliance in a regulated flow.
summaries.health: Patient access, clinical records, and care delivery connected securely.
summaries.logistics: Orders, routing, fleet, warehouse, and last-mile delivery orchestrated.
summaries.iot: Sensors, gateways, streaming, and dashboards for real-time operations.
summaries.data: Ingestion, ETL, warehouse, and analytics for measurable insights.
summaries.ecommerce: Catalog, cart, payments, fulfillment, and growth analytics unified.

meta.title: About – T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: A technology company specialized in intelligent, secure systems — with clear, measurable delivery.

intro.p1: T.E.N.E.G.T.A is a technology company specialized in building intelligent, secure systems.
intro.p2: We combine engineering discipline, operational understanding, and digital delivery in a way that is clear and measurable.
intro.p3: We work with organizations that want to improve performance, organize processes, and protect data — through tailored solutions, not generic templates.

AboutPage.valuesStatement: We believe good technology doesn’t just impress — it creates clear, lasting impact.

meta.title: Solutions – AI, cybersecurity, software & infrastructure | T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: Enterprise-grade AI, cybersecurity, custom software, and digital infrastructure — delivered as one coherent program for organizations worldwide.

hero.title: Solutions engineered for scale
hero.subtitle: Artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, software, and infrastructure — designed as a single delivery program, not disconnected initiatives.
hero.lead: We work with teams across regions to architect, deploy, and operate systems that respect data residency, security baselines, and how your business actually runs.

pillarsHead.title: Four capability pillars
pillarsHead.subtitle: Shared architecture principles, documentation, and handover — so your organization can own the roadmap with confidence.
pillarsHead.simHint: Open any pillar to launch a full-screen interactive simulation tailored to that capability.

ai.title: Artificial intelligence & analytics
ai.problem: Models work in notebooks but production lacks data contracts, owners, and SLOs.
ai.approach: We design event-driven feature pipelines, evaluation gates, and human-in-the-loop controls before scaling automation.
ai.outcome: Measurable KPI movement — not demo accuracy — with operable inference paths.
ai.clientVoice: We finally see the same number before the meeting.
ai.body: From raw signals to models — prediction, classification, and automation grounded in operational data you already have.
ai.b1: Analytics and forecasting where data quality supports reliable decisions
ai.b2: Reproducible ML workflows with evaluation, monitoring, and drift awareness
ai.b3: Human-in-the-loop controls for high-stakes or regulated decisions

cyber.title: Cybersecurity & resilience
cyber.problem: Alert noise drowns analysts; OT and IT logs do not speak the same language.
cyber.approach: Normalize, correlate, and automate playbooks with explicit human approval for sensitive actions.
cyber.outcome: Fewer false positives, faster containment, audit-ready trails.
cyber.clientVoice: Response became measurable — not a chain of midnight calls.
cyber.body: Protect identity, networks, and workloads with layered controls and operations you can observe and improve.
cyber.b1: Threat-informed design aligned to modern security baselines
cyber.b2: Detection, correlation, and response tuned to your SOC and tooling
cyber.b3: Continuous hardening — not a one-off audit checklist

software.title: Software & integration platforms
software.problem: Manual releases and mismatched environments block scale.
software.approach: API-first design, CI/CD with quality gates, and tenant-aware data models.
software.outcome: Confident monthly releases with production observability.
software.clientVoice: We ship twelve times a month now — with evidence, not hope.
software.body: Custom applications and integrations that connect people, data, and workflows across your technology estate.
software.b1: API-first integration with the systems you already run
software.b2: Role-based experiences for operators, analysts, and leadership
software.b3: Release discipline: staging, rollback paths, and production observability

infra.title: Digital infrastructure & operations
infra.problem: Fragile hosting and opaque operations inflate incident cost.
infra.approach: IaC, observability (metrics/logs/traces), and runbooks wired to your SLAs.
infra.outcome: Predictable operations with clear ownership and recovery paths.
infra.body: The foundation that keeps solutions reliable: data platforms, connectivity, deployment, and day-two operations.
infra.b1: Cloud and hybrid patterns aligned to your constraints and regions
infra.b2: Infrastructure as code and repeatable environments
infra.b3: Monitoring, SLOs, and runbooks your teams can execute without vendor lock-in

global.title: Built for international operations
global.lead: Whether you operate in one geography or many, we align architecture and delivery with regional requirements, identity providers, and network realities.
global.p1: Integration-first: extend what you already run instead of unnecessary greenfield replatforming.
global.p2: Procurement-friendly milestones, acceptance criteria, and documentation for IT and business stakeholders.
global.p3: A delivery model that supports distributed teams, hybrid footprints, and phased rollout.

intelligentSystems.title: How we build intelligent systems
intelligentSystems.subtitle: One engineering path from data to operator action — adapted to your sector, stack, and risk profile.

cta.title: Discuss your next initiative
cta.subtitle: Share goals, timelines, and constraints — we will propose a phased plan with clear outcomes.

common.disclaimer: Illustrative real-time simulation — not live production telemetry.

meta.title: AI & analytics simulation | T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: Interactive neural-field visualization: inference core, signal paths, and model sync — illustrative experience.

ai.title: Artificial intelligence & analytics
ai.subtitle: See how signals consolidate into an inference core — a stylized view of model-centric delivery.
ai.body: In production we wire reproducible ML workflows, monitoring, and human-in-the-loop controls to your data estate — this scene dramatizes signal flow for storytelling only.
ai.simpleExplainer: In plain terms: the left side is incoming information (like a colourful “fingerprint” of the data), the glowing centre is where the model does its work, and the bars on the right are possible outputs or scores. The moving dots show information travelling inward. The numbers are illustrative only—they are not real measurements from your systems.

meta.title: Cybersecurity radar simulation | T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: Interactive SOC-style radar: sweep detection, threat blips, and neutralization — illustrative experience.

cyber.title: Cybersecurity & resilience
cyber.subtitle: A live radar metaphor — threats surface, the sweep intersects, and events move to a cleared state.
cyber.body: Real programs combine detection engineering, correlation, and playbooks aligned to your SOC — this demo is a cinematic abstraction, not a live feed.
cyber.simpleExplainer: In plain terms: this radar is a metaphor for security monitoring. Red blips are like warnings; when the green sweep passes over them they turn safe (green) to show “handled.” The lines at the bottom are fake log messages for effect. This is not a live view of your network.

meta.title: Software mesh simulation | T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: Interactive service mesh: modules, API paths, and sync tokens — illustrative experience.

software.title: Software & integration
software.subtitle: Modules negotiate over curved paths — a metaphor for API-first integration and controlled releases.
software.body: We deliver integration-first platforms with staging, observability, and rollback — the animation highlights connectivity, not your actual architecture.
software.simpleExplainer: In plain terms: each box is a piece of software (API, service, job, etc.). The large box in the middle is like a gateway or front door. Curved lines are conversations between parts; gold and cyan dots show requests and responses passing along those paths. The green dots mean “this part is responding.” It is a diagram of teamwork between systems, not your real architecture.

meta.title: Infrastructure traffic simulation | T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: Interactive backbone view: regional load, backbone spine, and streaming bits — illustrative experience.

infra.title: Digital infrastructure & operations
infra.subtitle: Regional lanes pulse with load while bits traverse the backbone — a stylized operations picture.
infra.body: Operational work spans IaC, hybrid footprints, SLOs, and runbooks — this visualization is illustrative traffic art, not monitoring data.
infra.simpleExplainer: In plain terms: each horizontal row is a region or route (for example EU, US). The coloured bar shows how “busy” that path is. The vertical line in the middle is the main backbone—like a highway—and the bright dashes are packets of data moving along it. Times and totals in the corners are fictional examples to help you picture the idea, not live monitoring.

meta.title: How we build intelligent systems – T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: From data to models and operator dashboards — measurable engineering delivery across industries.

hero.title: How we build intelligent systems
hero.subtitle: We design and deliver integrated stacks: data, models, interfaces, and runbooks aligned to your goals — not slides alone.

diagram.title: Interactive architecture map
diagram.hint: Select a layer to see how we wire production-grade intelligent systems.

descriptions.ingest: Event contracts and quality gates normalize data at the boundary — before it pollutes downstream features.
descriptions.store: Analytical stores and feature layers with retention policies aligned to compliance and cost.
descriptions.model: Training, evaluation, and promotion workflows with drift monitoring — not one-off notebooks.
descriptions.api: Inference separated from product APIs; caching, auth, and SLOs owned by platform teams.
descriptions.observe: Metrics, logs, traces, and runbooks — incidents improve the system, not just close tickets.

flow.title: How data becomes action
flow.caption: A generic delivery path; industries differ, but engineering discipline stays consistent.

demo.title: Illustrative dashboard (sample)
demo.caption: Numbers below are fictional examples — for storytelling only, not a guarantee of results.

one.title: Operations & service delivery
one.body: Unify telemetry, tickets, and SLAs with predictive load and staffing views.

two.title: Security & compliance
two.body: Correlate signals, prioritize incidents, and automate playbooks.

three.title: Field & industrial environments
three.body: Connect sensors and production data to quality, maintenance, and safety KPIs.

what.title: What we test in a pilot

what.b2: Data readiness and quality gates (what we trust vs what we fix)
what.b3: Security baseline: identity, access, audit trail, and production-safe practices

meta.title: Technology & engineering stack – T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: A practical engineering standard: security baselines, observability, reproducible delivery, and a stack chosen for production.

hero.title: Technology that scales with your ambition
hero.subtitle: We ship production systems with measurable SLOs, security baselines, and operator-ready runbooks — using a modern stack chosen for reliability, auditability, and long-term maintainability.

TechPage.stackSectionSubtitle: Representative technologies used in enterprise-grade programs. Final selections follow your compliance constraints, data residency, and target architecture.

standards.title: Engineering standards we ship with
standards.subtitle: Tooling matters — but standards matter more. These are the practices we apply to reduce risk and keep delivery predictable.

s1.title: Identity, least privilege, audit trails
s1.body: Clear access boundaries, hardened delivery pipelines, and change traceability suitable for enterprise procurement.

s2.title: Metrics, logs, traces → actions
s2.body: Dashboards and runbooks that operators can execute: alerting, triage, and recovery — not just pretty charts.

s3.title: Reproducible builds and rollbacks
s3.body: Staging, canary/gradual release when needed, and rollback paths with evidence and acceptance criteria.

s4.title: Definitions you can trust
s4.body: Data contracts, quality gates, and governance so analytics and ML programs remain auditable and stable over time.

p1.title: Reliability & performance
p1.body: We design for measurable SLOs: resilient services, caching where it matters, and performance budgets that survive peak load — not demo-day benchmarks.

p2.title: Security & trust
p2.body: Least-privilege access, hardened delivery pipelines, and traceable changes. Security is embedded in how we build and operate — not bolted on at the end.

p3.title: Observability & operations
p3.body: Metrics, logs, and traces wired into actionable dashboards and runbooks — so teams can detect, triage, and recover with clarity under pressure.

p4.title: Portability & evolution
p4.body: We favour open interfaces and automation so your estate can evolve without unnecessary lock-in — from pilots to scaled production.

platform.title: Platform thinking, not tool shopping
platform.body: Tools change; discipline endures. We align technology choices to measurable outcomes — faster decisions, lower operational risk, and systems your teams can run with confidence.

meta.title: Investors & partnerships – T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: Institutional narrative: market thesis, governance, and investor relations for T.E.N.E.G.T.A.

hero.title: Building intelligent systems for the enterprise decade
hero.subtitle: T.E.N.E.G.T.A designs and delivers AI, cybersecurity, and integration-first platforms with engineering discipline — from pilot to production. This page summarizes how we think about value creation, risk, and long-term partnerships.

thesis.title: Investment thesis
thesis.body:
Enterprises are consolidating around data-centric operations, AI-assisted decisions, and zero-trust security models. T.E.N.E.G.T.A sits at the intersection: we ship deployable systems — not slideware — with measurable KPIs, staged rollouts, and operator-ready runbooks.

Our differentiation is execution: reproducible delivery, observability by default, and architectures that respect hybrid footprints and regulatory realities.

opportunity.title: Market opportunity
opportunity.body:
Digital transformation budgets continue to shift from generic IT projects to outcome-linked programs: predictive operations, security analytics, and automation that demonstrably reduce cost or risk.

We engage where complexity is high and vendor lock-in is costly — offering an engineering-led alternative aligned to client governance and data residency constraints.

model.title: Business model (high level)
model.body:
Revenue is driven by scoped professional services, milestone-based project delivery, and long-term support retainers tied to evolving systems. Engagements are structured with clear acceptance criteria, documentation, and handover — reducing execution ambiguity for clients and counterparties.

We prioritize sustainable delivery margins over undifferentiated scale; growth follows referenceable outcomes and repeat expansions within accounts.

governance.title: Governance, transparency & risk
governance.body:
We maintain clear contractual boundaries, intellectual property clarity, and security baselines appropriate to enterprise procurement. Our engineering process emphasizes audit trails in delivery (versioning, change records, test evidence) and operational transparency through observability.

Forward-looking statements on this site are illustrative; they are not guarantees of future performance. Investment decisions require independent due diligence and binding agreements.

ir.title: Investor & partnership inquiries
ir.body: For qualified institutional investors, strategic partners, and structured alliance discussions, we provide a single intake path. Share your mandate, timeline, and constraints — we respond with the appropriate materials and next steps subject to mutual fit and confidentiality requirements.

InvestorsPage.disclaimer: This website does not constitute an offer to sell or a solicitation of an offer to buy any securities. Information herein is for general corporate communication only and may change without notice. Past project examples are not indicative of future results.

CookieConsent.message: We use optional analytics cookies to understand traffic and improve the site. Essential cookies are always on. You can accept analytics or continue with essential cookies only.

meta.title: Privacy policy – T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: How T.E.N.E.G.T.A collects, uses, and protects personal data.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy policy
PrivacyPage.intro: This policy describes how T.E.N.E.G.T.A (“we”, “us”) handles personal information when you use our website and request information about our AI systems and services. It is provided for transparency; it does not replace legal advice for your jurisdiction.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: The operator of this website and primary contact for privacy matters is T.E.N.E.G.T.A. For requests, use the contact details in the Contact section below.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.body: We may collect: (1) identifiers and contact details you submit via forms (name, email, company, message); (2) technical data such as IP address, browser type, and approximate location derived from IP; (3) usage data if you consent to analytics cookies.

purposes.title: Purposes of processing
purposes.body: We use your data to respond to inquiries, operate and secure the website, improve content and UX, and—if you consent—to measure traffic with analytics tools.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis (EEA/UK visitors)
legalBasis.body: Where GDPR applies: contract or pre-contract steps for inquiries you initiate; legitimate interests in site security and improvement; consent for non-essential cookies and analytics when required.

cookies.title: Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.body: Essential cookies may be needed for basic functionality. Analytics cookies (e.g. Google Analytics) load only after you accept via our banner, where configured. You can change your mind by clearing site data or contacting us.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Contact submissions are kept only as long as needed to handle your request and for a limited backup period, unless a longer period is required by law.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, rectify, delete, restrict, or object to processing, and to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. Contact us to exercise these rights.

transfers.title: International transfers
transfers.body: If we use providers outside your country, we rely on appropriate safeguards (such as standard contractual clauses) where required.

children.title: Children
children.body: Our services are directed at businesses and professionals. The site is not intended for children under 16.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions, use the details on our Contact page or the legal email published there.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update this policy; the “Last updated” date will change. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance where permitted by law.

meta.title: Terms & conditions – T.E.N.E.G.T.A
meta.description: Terms of use for the T.E.N.E.G.T.A website.

TermsPage.title: Terms & conditions
TermsPage.intro: By accessing this website you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the site. T.E.N.E.G.T.A builds and delivers AI and software systems; website content is informational unless you enter a separate agreement.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.body: These terms apply to all visitors. We may update them; check the Last updated date. Some services may have additional written terms.

services.title: Website vs services
services.body: The site describes capabilities and illustrative examples. Demos, case studies, and metrics may be simplified or indicative. Binding scope, fees, and deliverables are set only in a signed statement of work or contract.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: You must not misuse the site: no unlawful activity, no attempt to breach security, no automated scraping that harms performance, and no submission of malicious content through forms.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: Branding, text, layout, and media on this site are owned by T.E.N.E.G.T.A or licensors. You may not copy or redistribute except as allowed by law or with our permission.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers
disclaimer.body: The site is provided “as is”. Interactive demos and examples are not professional, financial, medical, or agronomic advice. Past or illustrative outcomes are not guarantees of future results.

limitation.title: Limitation of liability
limitation.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, T.E.N.E.G.T.A is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of the site. Total liability for site-related claims is limited where the law allows.

privacyLink.title: Privacy
privacyLink.body: Personal data is processed as described in our Privacy policy.

law.title: Governing law
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws applicable to T.E.N.E.G.T.A’s place of establishment, without regard to conflict-of-law rules, unless mandatory consumer protections in your country say otherwise.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For legal notices related to these terms, use the contact information on the Contact page.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms. Material changes will be reflected by updating the Last updated date.

whyNow.body: Organizations that unify data, automate decisions responsibly, and harden systems move faster and compete more effectively. Digital change is no longer optional — it is an operational and strategic necessity.

playbook.headline: Interactive marketing command page

contract.valueLine: Pitch this product as a measurable outcome package, not a one-off service.
contract.note1: Start with business impact and tie each feature to money, time, or conversion.
contract.note2: Set one clear next step before ending the call (audit, demo, or proposal date).
contract.note3: Anchor value first, then discuss price with rollout scope and timeline.

talk.noScript: No script is configured for this mode yet.
talk.focusTrust: Use proof, similar cases, and clear expected outcomes.
talk.focusCost: Emphasize ROI, timeline efficiency, and payback speed.
talk.focusSpeed: Highlight deployment speed and immediate operational wins.

checklist.title: Pre-close checklist
checklist.fit: Confirmed ICP fit and decision owner

checklist.hint: Keep one dominant message: outcome first, action second, details third.

cup.resetConfirm: Remettre tous les bonus admin à zéro ?
cup.closeHint: La clôture accorde les badges creator_cup_gold, creator_cup_silver et creator_cup_bronze.

chat.empty: No messages yet — write the first line.
chat.communityHint: Salon partenaires public — noms visibles pour tous les membres.
chat.creatorChatHint: Groupe privé créateurs — membres invités uniquement.
chat.partnerSupportHint: The admin team usually replies during business hours.

bubble.etaReply: Première réponse habituelle sous un jour ouvré.
bubble.emptyHint: Posez une question sur une affaire, commission ou niveau.

quickReplies.dealStatus: Quel est le statut de ma dernière affaire ?

intelligence.directive_push_close: Lock one decisive close step — deadline + next signature.
intelligence.directive_offer_bonus: Authorize a performance bonus now to remove last-mile friction.
intelligence.directive_ask_update: Demand a blocker update with a clear 24h reply window.
intelligence.directive_commission_nudge: Re-state commission so payout expectation unlocks momentum.
intelligence.directiveImpactHint: If executed: illustrative impact ≈ +{n}% close probability
intelligence.commitAction_push_close: Push close now — one deadline + next signature.
intelligence.commitAction_ask_update: Demand a blocker update — 24h reply window
intelligence.probShiftModeled: Illustrative shift for this intervention — not a live forecast.
intelligence.expectedOutcomeCloseMin: Deal likely closes within ~{m} min if cadence holds
intelligence.expectedOutcomeHint: Heuristic from score + state — not a guarantee.
intelligence.noFocusDeal: No pending deal in focus — link a deal or wait for pipeline.
intelligence.insightRescue: Rescue mode: reduce pendings with explicit dates before incentives.
intelligence.insightPushClose: Momentum is high — push a single next step and optional micro-bonus.
intelligence.insightMomentum: Streak is hot — stack a crisp recap + deadline to convert.
intelligence.insightFollowUp: Solid window — ask for blockers and confirm the close window.
intelligence.insightSteady: Steady state — keep rhythm; log next touchpoint.
intelligence.patternCloser: Pattern: strong closer — rewards after decisive pushes land well.
intelligence.patternHeavyPipeline: Pattern: heavy pending load — shorter cycles beat big pushes.
intelligence.cmdStateClosingSub: Strong close signal — drive one decisive next step.
intelligence.cmdStateRescueSub: High risk load — dates and clarity before bigger incentives.
intelligence.cmdStateStaleSub: Score dropped from age or drag — unblock the deal explicitly.
intelligence.cmdStateSteadySub: No extreme signal — keep rhythm and logging.
intelligence.empty: Select a conversation to see partner intelligence.

riskReason.riskHighPending: Many pending deals with no streak — risk of stall.
riskReason.riskMediumFollowUp: Several pendings and low streak — schedule a nudge.

admin.pageSubtitle: Three-column desk: partner list, bubble thread, and decision radar.
admin.pickHint: Pick a partner from the list or search by name or email.

eventContacts.hint: Ajoutez ou modifiez les noms et le statut de contact. Vous pouvez aussi ré-extraire depuis les publications.
eventContacts.empty: Aucun nom — ajoutez manuellement ou publiez des mises à jour.
eventContacts.name: Nom

chatModerators.title: Qui peut modifier et supprimer les messages
chatModerators.hint: Les modérateurs gèrent les messages des salles auxquelles ils ont accès.

creatorsPage.title: Programme créateurs
creatorsPage.subtitle: Gérez l'accès Creator Hub pour les partenaires — les badge holders rejoignent automatiquement.
creatorsPage.accessNote: L'accès salon ne modifie pas commissions, XP ni deals. Impossible de révoquer un détenteur du badge content_creator.
creatorsPage.roomHint: Ces partenaires voient Creator Hub dans la navigation et utilisent chat, kit et cup.
creatorsPage.emptyRoom: Personne dans le groupe pour l'instant.
creatorsPage.badgeHint: Ajout auto à l'octroi du badge — vous pouvez ajouter d'autres partenaires.

partners.title: Partner management
partners.subtitle: Créez les comptes ici uniquement — inscription publique désactivée. Voir, modifier, désactiver ou supprimer tout partenaire.
partners.createHint: E-mail, mot de passe et profil créés ensemble. N'utilisez pas l'e-mail admin. Inscription publique désactivée.
partners.deleteHint: Supprime le partenaire, ses affaires et écritures. Les filleuls directs sont détachés, pas supprimés.
partners.deleteWarningReferrals: {n} filleuls directs — seront détachés après suppression.
partners.name: Name
partners.uplineWarning: Les commissions passées ne sont pas recalculées.

errors.invalid_input: Check the fields (valid email, password at least 8 characters).
errors.missing_seed: Database not initialized — run seed on the server.
errors.confirm_mismatch: L'e-mail de confirmation ne correspond pas

invites.title: Cartes d'invitation
invites.subtitle: Créez des liens d'invitation cinématiques et des cartes QR pour les créateurs — ne crée pas de comptes partenaires automatiquement.
invites.createHint: Après création : copiez le lien ou téléchargez la carte QR et envoyez-la au créateur.
invites.name: Nom
invites.empty: Aucune invitation — créez la première avec le formulaire ci-dessus.

errors.createFailed: Impossible de créer l'invitation — vérifiez les champs.

demo.pageLead: Investor-grade walkthrough: scripted revenue beats, network pulse, and intelligence — without touching production data.
demo.storyChatEmpty: Story beats will appear here as the demo runs.
demo.reducedBody: Every beat is summarized below. Use “Next beat” to advance manually.
demo.startError: Could not start the demo. Check your connection and try again.

orders.title: Demandes de contact
orders.subtitle: Demandes depuis la page contact — client, créateur, code et type de service.

payoutsPage.title: Payout requests
payoutsPage.hint: Approve partner withdrawal requests, then mark as paid after transfer.

badgesPage.title: Assign admin badge
badgesPage.revokeHint: Removes any badge (including auto badges) from the user.

grantStudio.title: Accorder avec cérémonie
grantStudio.hint: Choisissez le badge et les partenaires — aperçu chat et profil.

rewardsPage.title: Leaderboard rewards
rewardsPage.hint: Applies configured monthly cash bonuses to top partners (idempotent for the current UTC month).

missionsPage.title: Missions quotidiennes
missionsPage.hint: Les missions avec le même chainGroup forment une quête — bonus XP après approbation admin.
missionsPage.pendingHint: Les points de puissance ne sont crédités qu'après approbation ici.

auditPage.title: Audit et activité partenaires
auditPage.hint: Connexions et activité des partenaires, plus actions admin.
auditPage.emptyPartners: Aucune activité — les connexions apparaîtront désormais.

insightsPage.title: Operational insights
insightsPage.inactiveTitle: Partners inactive (no closed deal in 30 days)

overridesPage.title: Partner commission overrides
overridesPage.hint: Leave product slug empty for a global override. Values apply on the next deal close.

bonusesPage.title: Manual bonuses
bonusesPage.hint: Credits a tier-0 ledger entry (visible in partner earnings).

tiersPage.title: Multi-level commission (basis points)
tiersPage.hint: 10000 bps = 100% of the product commission base to tier 1. Tier 2/3 are additional percentages of the same base.

admin.tiersMissingSeed: Tier configuration is missing. Run: npx prisma db seed

auth.name: Name
auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.registerIntro: Create your partner profile to start earning when deals close.
auth.inviteRegisterHint: Invitation acceptée — inscrivez-vous avec le même e-mail pour débloquer le badge créateur.
auth.inviteRegisterBanner: Vous vous inscrivez avec une invitation spéciale T.E.N.E.G.T.A
auth.signInHeroTitle: Votre centre de commande performance partenaire
auth.signInHeroLine1: Commissions, levels, and XP — unified in one live workspace.
auth.signInHeroLine2: Build rank and reputation that compound instead of one-off hustle.
auth.signInHeroLine3: Network-aware payouts built for operators who scale with discipline.
auth.registeredBanner: Compte créé — connectez-vous avec votre e-mail et mot de passe.
auth.registrationClosedBanner: Inscription publique fermée. Connectez-vous uniquement si l'admin a créé votre compte.

errors.missing_seed: Server data is not ready. Run database seed.
